case_title: MELARA VINCENTE ELEWIN VS RODRIGUEZ MIGUEL A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $253.00 FILED BY MELARA VINCENTE ELEWIN AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MIGUEL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MIGUEL A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELARA VINCENTE ELEWIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MIGUEL A. $253.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $282.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MIGUEL A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MIGUEL A.
